name: New Potatoes with Green Onion Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 C. sliced green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes.
2. Cut them in half if they are large.
3. Place them in a pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil.
4. Add salt to the boiling water.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 20 to 25 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and add butter, sliced green onions, and pepper.
7. Cook for an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
8. Make a paste by mixing flour with half of the evaporated milk in a separate bowl.
9. Add this mixture to the pot containing potatoes and onions; stir until smooth.
10. Stir in the remaining evaporated milk.
11. Return to heat and cook until the sauce thickens.
12. Serves 6.
